workloads.comparabilityNotes: Package-surface vector workload. Both sides upload the same cache-backed input, execute the same WGSL kernel, and read back the same capture size.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Prepared package runs repeat the full plan cycle inside each timed sample and report per-cycle normalized timing.
workloads.name: package vector scale/add 262k

workloads.comparabilityNotes: Package-surface upload/readback workload. Both sides write the same cache-backed payload and perform the same readback capture.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Prepared package runs repeat the full plan cycle inside each timed sample and report per-cycle normalized timing.
workloads.name: package buffer upload/readback 1MB

workloads.comparabilityNotes: Package-surface image-style transform. Both sides upload the same cache-backed 1024x1024 RGBA-shaped input, execute the same WGSL kernel, and read back the same capture size.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Prepared package runs repeat the full plan cycle inside each timed sample and report per-cycle normalized timing.
workloads.name: package image RGBA invert 1024

workloads.comparabilityNotes: Package-surface tiny compute submission workload. Both sides execute one dispatch, copy to readback, and wait for completion through the package executor.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Prepared package runs repeat the full plan cycle inside each timed sample and report per-cycle normalized timing.
workloads.description: Tiny compute dispatch plus completion and readback.
workloads.name: package queue submit completion
